briefdescription.para: Checks whether the controller is initialized.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: true if controller is initialized, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the controller is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: true if controller is enabled, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the controller is suspended.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: true if controller is suspended, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, udc_event_cb_t event_cb, const void *const event_ctx)
memberdef.name: udc_init

detaileddescription.para: Initialize USB device controller and control IN/OUT endpoint. After initialization controller driver should be able to detect power state of the bus and signal power state changes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Event callback from the higher layer (USB device stack)
Opaque pointer to higher layer context

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: on parameter error (no callback is passed)

detaileddescription.para: Enable powered USB device controller and allow host to recognize and enumerate the device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Disable enabled USB device controller. The driver should continue to detect power state changes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Shut down the controller completely to reduce energy consumption or to change the role of the controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain the capabilities of the controller such as full speed (FS), high speed (HS), and more.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: USB device controller capabilities.

detaileddescription.para: The function should be called after the reset event to determine the actual bus speed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: USB device controller capabilities.

detaileddescription.para: Set address of enabled USB device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: controller is not enabled (or not initialized)

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t mode, const bool dryrun)
memberdef.name: udc_test_mode

detaileddescription.para: For compliance testing, high-speed controllers must support test modes. A particular test is enabled by a SetFeature(TEST_MODE) request. To disable a test mode, device needs to be power cycled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance
Verify that a particular mode can be enabled, but do not enable test mode

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Initiate host wakeup. Only possible when the bus is suspended.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

parameterdescription.para: controller is not enabled (or not initialized)

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t ep, const uint8_t attributes, uint16_t *const mps, const uint8_t interval)
memberdef.name: udc_ep_try_config

detaileddescription.para: Try an endpoint configuration based on endpoint descriptor. This function may modify wMaxPacketSize descriptor fields of the endpoint. All properties of the descriptor, such as direction, and transfer type, should be set correctly. If wMaxPacketSize value is zero, it will be updated to maximum buffer size of the endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t ep, const uint8_t attributes, const uint16_t mps, const uint8_t interval)
memberdef.name: udc_ep_enable

detaileddescription.para: Configure and make an endpoint ready for use. Valid for all endpoints except control IN/OUT.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for all endpoints except control IN/OUT.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for all endpoints.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for all endpoints.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

detaileddescription.para: Add request to the queue. If the queue is empty, the request buffer can be claimed by the controller immediately.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

briefdescription.para: Purges control endpoint queues after controller shutdown.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.
-EBUSY controller is not shutdown

briefdescription.para: Determines if endpoint queue is empty.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: true if endpoint queue is empty, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Remove all USB device controller requests from endpoint queue.

detaileddescription.para: UDC_EVT_EP_REQUEST event will be generated when the driver releases claimed buffer, no new requests will be claimed, all requests in the queue will passed as chained list of the event variable buf. The endpoint queue is empty after that.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t ep, const size_t size)
memberdef.name: udc_ep_buf_alloc

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new buffer from common request buffer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated request or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Allocate UDC control transfer SETUP buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new buffer from common control transfer buffer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated request or NULL on error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const uint8_t ep, const size_t size)
memberdef.name: udc_ctrl_data_alloc

briefdescription.para: Allocate UDC control transfer data stage buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new buffer from common control transfer buffer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated request or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Allocate UDC control transfer status stage buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new buffer from common control transfer buffer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: pointer to allocated request or NULL on error.

detaileddescription.para: Put the buffer back into the request buffer pool.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

briefdescription.para: Set ZLP flag in requests metadata.

detaileddescription.para: The controller should send a ZLP at the end of the transfer.

simplesect.para: pointer to metadata structure.

briefdescription.para: Get pointer to higher layer context.

detaileddescription.para: The address of the context is passed as an argument to the udc_init() function and is stored in the UDC data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: Opaque pointer to higher layer context

briefdescription.para: Get endpoint size from UDC endpoint configuration.

simplesect.para: Endpoint size

briefdescription.para: New USB device controller (UDC) driver API.
